title: Police and Prisoners
description: In this mod enforce the laws!
body:
Ever wanted to become an officer of the law or a prisoner? Well now you can with Police and Prisoners!

With police and prisoners you can help enforce the laws with your baton

And give you prisoners uniform without protection for roleplay

With the handcuffs you can force the prisoners into there cell!

The baton gives blindness and slowness to help capture the prisoners


Features

- Baton
- Handcuffs
- Prisoner uniform
